seoTitle: Kumbarilla vs Kunda Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kumbarilla and Kunda Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kumbarilla vs Kunda Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kumbarilla and Kunda Park.
heading: Kumbarilla vs Kunda Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kumbarilla, Queensland and Kunda Park, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kumbarilla has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Kunda Park (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kumbarilla or Kunda Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kumbarilla has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Kunda Park scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kumbarilla scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Kunda Park scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kumbarilla or Kunda Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kumbarilla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
